name: calendar-canvas
description: A desktop calendar wallpaper utility with sync, holidays, and custom entries.

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 .main-ready && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electronmon dist-electron/main/index.js
scripts.dev:electron:inspect: wait-on tcp:5173 .main-ready && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 OPEN_DEVTOOLS=1 electronmon dist-electron/main/index.js
scripts.dev:stack: npm run dev:clear-ready && concurrently -k -n web,main,electron -c cyan,yellow,green "npm:dev:web" "npm:dev:main" "npm:dev:electron"
scripts.dev:stack:inspect: npm run dev:clear-ready && concurrently -k -n web,main,electron -c cyan,yellow,green "npm:dev:web" "npm:dev:main" "npm:dev:electron:inspect"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:main
